data.phrase:
datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp sum(xdm.target.sent_bytes) as total_bytes_sent by _time

|limit 100 


| view graph type = line header = "Outbound Data Transfer Over Time (Bytes)" xaxis = _time yaxis = total_bytes_sent

datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(xdm.event.id) as total_requests, count(if(to_number(xdm.network.http.response_code) in (400, 401, 403, 404, 500, 502, 503, 504), xdm.event.id)) as error_requests
| alter error_rate = divide(round(multiply(divide(error_requests, total_requests), 10000)), 100)
| alter metric_label = "Error Rate"


| view graph type = pie header = "Overall Error Rate (4xx/5xx)" xaxis = error_requests yaxis = total_requests

datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as count by xdm.network.http.response_code



| view graph type = pie header = "HTTP Status Code Distribution" show_callouts = `true` xaxis = xdm.network.http.response_code yaxis = count

datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as request_count by xdm.source.ipv4
| sort desc request_count
| limit 10


| view graph type = column subtype = horizontal header = "Top 10 Requesting Client IPs" xaxis = xdm.source.ipv4 yaxis = xdm.source.ipv4,request_count

datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as request_count by xdm.source.user_agent
| sort desc request_count
| limit 10


| view graph type = column subtype = horizontal header = "Top 10 User-Agents by Request Count" xaxis = xdm.source.user_agent yaxis = xdm.source.user_agent,request_count

datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as total_requests by xdm.network.http.url
| sort desc total_requests
| limit 10

| view graph type = column subtype = horizontal header = "Top 10 Requested URLs" xaxis = xdm.network.http.url yaxis = xdm.network.http.url,total_requests

datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as total_requests by xdm.network.http.url
| sort desc total_requests
| limit 10


| view graph type = column subtype = horizontal header = "Top 10 Requested URLs" xaxis = xdm.network.http.url yaxis = xdm.network.http.url,total_requests

widgets_data.title: Apache - HTTP Status Code Distribution
widgets_data.description: This query gives you an at-a-glance understanding of the server's health by showing the proportion of successful requests versus client-side and server-side errors.

data.phrase:
datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as count by xdm.network.http.response_code



| view graph type = pie header = "HTTP Status Code Distribution" show_callouts = `true` xaxis = xdm.network.http.response_code yaxis = count

widgets_data.title: Apache - Error Rate Percentage
widgets_data.description: Calculates the percentage of requests that resulted in a client or server error (4xx or 5xx) versus all requests

data.phrase:
datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(xdm.event.id) as total_requests, count(if(to_number(xdm.network.http.response_code) in (400, 401, 403, 404, 500, 502, 503, 504), xdm.event.id)) as error_requests
| alter error_rate = divide(round(multiply(divide(error_requests, total_requests), 10000)), 100)
| alter metric_label = "Error Rate"


| view graph type = pie header = "Overall Error Rate (4xx/5xx)" xaxis = error_requests yaxis = total_requests

datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as request_count by xdm.source.ipv4
| sort desc request_count
| limit 10


| view graph type = column subtype = horizontal header = "Top 10 Requesting Client IPs" xaxis = xdm.source.ipv4 yaxis = xdm.source.ipv4,request_count

datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as request_count by xdm.source.user_agent
| sort desc request_count
| limit 10


| view graph type = column subtype = horizontal header = "Top 10 User-Agents by Request Count" xaxis = xdm.source.user_agent yaxis = xdm.source.user_agent,request_count

widgets_data.title: Apache - Outbound Data Transfer over time
widgets_data.description: Dashboard to look for spikes in traffic

data.phrase:
datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| alter bin_time = _time
| bin bin_time span = 5m
| comp sum(xdm.target.sent_bytes) as total_bytes_sent by bin_time
| sort asc bin_time 
|limit 100 



| view graph type = line header = "Outbound Data Transfer Over Time (Bytes)" xaxis = bin_time yaxis = total_bytes_sent seriestitle("total_bytes_sent","Total Bytes sent (5 minute average)")

datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as total_requests by xdm.network.http.url
| sort desc total_requests
| limit 10

| view graph type = column subtype = horizontal header = "Top 10 Requested URLs" xaxis = xdm.network.http.url yaxis = xdm.network.http.url,total_requests

widgets_data.title: Apache - Top 10 Least visisted URL's
widgets_data.description: This can be an indication of someone probing pages looking at non-commonly access pages for issues

data.phrase:
datamodel dataset = apache_httpd_raw
| comp count(_time) as total_requests by xdm.network.http.url
| sort desc total_requests
| limit 10


| view graph type = column subtype = horizontal header = "Top 10 Requested URLs" xaxis = xdm.network.http.url yaxis = xdm.network.http.url,total_requests
